# FinSight — Copilot Instructions

Local-first personal finance app. Rust/Tauri 2 backend · React 18 + TypeScript + Vite frontend · SQLite/SQLCipher encrypted storage · tanstack-query · AI-assisted categorization.

## Commands

```bash
# Install JS deps
pnpm install

# Full dev environment (Tauri + Vite hot reload)
# NOTE: debug builds use an ISOLATED `<identifier>.dev` app-data dir and start
# EMPTY — they never touch the real production DB. Copy the prod DB into the
# `.dev` dir, or build --release, to test against real data.
pnpm tauri:dev

# Frontend only (faster for UI-only work)
cd ui && npm run dev

# All Rust tests
cargo test --workspace

# Single Rust test
cargo test -p finsight-core --lib repos::transactions::tests::update_transaction_notes

# All frontend tests
cd ui && npx vitest run

# Single frontend test file
cd ui && npx vitest run src/screens/Settings.test.tsx

# TypeScript type-check
cd ui && npx tsc --noEmit
# (or via pnpm filter)
pnpm --filter ui typecheck

# Regenerate TypeScript bindings after ANY Rust command change (run from repo root)
cargo run -p finsight-tauri --bin export_bindings

# Lint
cargo fmt --all -- --check
cargo clippy --workspace --all-targets -- -D warnings

# Build frontend
pnpm --filter ui build
```

## Architecture

### Rust workspace (5 crates)

| Crate | Role |
|---|---|
| `crates/finsight-core` | Domain layer: models, SQLCipher DB pool (r2d2), migrations (Refinery), repository functions, settings KV store. All SQL lives here. No Tauri dependency. |
| `crates/finsight-providers` | CSV import parsers, LLM provider HTTP clients (`CompletionProvider` trait with Ollama / OpenAI-compat / Anthropic impls). |
| `crates/finsight-agent` | AI layer: Copilot context engine, planner, executor, recipe runner, categorizer pipeline, anomaly detection. Runs on a background Tokio task via `AgentHandle`. |
| `crates/finsight-app` | Tauri command surface. Commands in `src/commands/` call into `finsight-core` repos. `AppState` holds a `Db` clone and an `AgentHandle`. |
| `src-tauri` (alias `finsight-tauri`) | Binary entry point + `export_bindings` binary that writes `ui/src/api/bindings.ts`. |

### DB access: the `run()` pattern

All DB access in Tauri commands uses this pattern:

```rust
run(&db, move |conn| {
    // conn: &mut rusqlite::Connection — blocking I/O offloaded to Tokio thread
    // return CoreResult<T>
})
.await
.map_err(AppError::from)
```

### Adding a Tauri command

1. Write `pub async fn my_cmd(state: tauri::State<'_, AppState>) -> AppResult<T>` in `crates/finsight-app/src/commands/`
2. Add `#[tauri::command]` and `#[specta::specta]` attributes — **commands must be `async`** even if the work is synchronous (specta requirement)
3. Register in `build_specta_builder()` → `collect_commands![..., commands::mymod::my_cmd]` in `crates/finsight-app/src/lib.rs`
4. Run `cargo run -p finsight-tauri --bin export_bindings` from repo root — regenerates `ui/src/api/bindings.ts`

### Database migrations

SQL files in `crates/finsight-core/migrations/` named `V00N__description.sql`. Discovered automatically by Refinery via `embed_migrations!`. Current latest: V016. Next migration file = `V017__description.sql`.

### Frontend data flow

```
ui/src/api/bindings.ts      ← generated by export_bindings — NEVER edit manually
ui/src/api/client.ts        ← re-exports bindings (always import from here, not bindings.ts directly)
ui/src/api/hooks/           ← tanstack-query wrappers (useTransactions, useBudgetEnvelopes, etc.)
ui/src/screens/             ← one file per screen, consumes hooks
ui/src/components/          ← shared UI: Sidebar, CommandPalette, TransactionDrawer, Drawer, Icons
ui/src/state/tweaks.ts      ← zustand store for theme/density/accent/privacy (persisted to localStorage)
```

## Key Conventions

### TypeScript field naming inconsistency

The `Transaction` type in bindings uses **snake_case** (`t.merchant_raw`, `t.posted_at`, `t.amount_cents`) because its Rust struct lacks `rename_all`. Most other types (e.g. `BudgetEnvelope`, `CategoryWithSpending`, `TxnFilterInput`) use **camelCase** via `#[serde(rename_all = "camelCase")]`. Always check `bindings.ts` when accessing fields on a newly encountered type.

### CSS — no hardcoded colors

Use design tokens (defined in `ui/src/styles/tokens.css`):
```
var(--ink)  var(--ink-mute)  var(--ink-faint)  var(--line)
var(--elevated)  var(--accent)  var(--negative)  var(--surface-2)
```

Use component utility classes (defined in `ui/src/styles/app.css`):
`.card` `.chip` `.btn` `.tbl` `.stat` `.eyebrow` `.toolbar` `.stream` `.goal-bar` `.stub` `.muted` `.num` `.money`

### Icons

Import from `ui/src/components/Icons.tsx` using the `icon()` factory pattern — do not import icon libraries directly.

### UI patterns

- **Toasts:** `import { toast } from "sonner"` → `toast.success()`, `toast.error()`, `toast("text", { description, action })`
- **Slide-in panels:** reuse `ui/src/components/Drawer.tsx`
- **Privacy mode:** `useTweaks().privacy` — monetary amounts displayed in the UI must use `className="money"` so CSS blurring applies automatically

## Testing

- Frontend: vitest + jsdom + `@testing-library/react`. Setup: `ui/src/test/setup.ts`
- axe a11y tests produce jsdom canvas warnings in stderr — expected, non-fatal
- `keychain::tests::*` are `#[cfg_attr(target_os = "linux", ignore)]` (gnome-keyring unavailable in headless CI); run normally on macOS/Windows
- `set_key_round_trip` is intermittently flaky under parallel execution on Windows (pre-existing)
- **Expected green bar:** 548 Rust tests (+12 ignored live-DB/keychain), 436 frontend tests, 0 TypeScript errors

## Financial Freedom Framework

The Copilot AI is guided by principles from six personal finance books. When extending the Copilot, writing new features, or building prompts, align with these:

| Principle | Source | Where it lives |
|---|---|---|
| Pay Yourself First (≥10%) | *Babylon* / *Ramsey* | Savings rate card on Today; Babylon nudge; Copilot priority #1 in system prompt |
| Emergency Fund (3–6 months) | *Ramsey* / *Sethi* | Goals quick-fill button; `WellnessContext.emergency_fund_months` in context.rs |
| Debt Snowball (smallest first) | *Ramsey* | `WellnessContext.debt_snowball` ordered by remaining balance ASC |
| Conscious Spending | *Sethi* | `spending_type` on categories (Need/Want/Saving/Investment); allocation donut on Budget |
| Compound Growth | *Hill* / *Kiyosaki* | Compound Growth Projector on Goals (10/20/30-year at 7% annual) |
| Behaviour > math | *Housel* | Copilot nudges surface patterns, not just numbers |
| Financial Journey | *All* | `/journey` screen: 7 milestones from stability → freedom |

**Key files:**
- `crates/finsight-agent/src/planner.rs → build_system_prompt()` — embeds the framework in every LLM call
- `crates/finsight-agent/src/context.rs → wellness_context()` — computes wellness metrics from DB for context
- `ui/src/screens/Journey.tsx` — visual 7-milestone journey screen
